name: Brand-Conversion-Correlation (BCC)
description: A statistical coefficient measuring the impact of Brand-Fidelity (BFI) and Narrative-Integrity (SHNP) on User-Conversion-Rates.
goalMapping: Validates the ROI of the 'Visual-Token-Governance' and 'Self-Healing-Narrative' protocols.

thresholds.critical: < 0.30 (Brand is 'De-coupled' from Growth; Marketing is ineffective)
